name: inmotion-ftp-upload
description: Uploads the built Astro site to InMotion hosting over FTP.

interface.shortDescription: Build and deploy the site to joshuahoffman.studio via FTP.
interface.longDescription: Runs a publish step and uploads your local dist folder to InMotion hosting using FTP.
defaultPrompt: Deploy the latest build to FTP with the InMotion plugin.
Run the upload script and report any files that failed to transfer.
Prepare a dry-run upload summary for the current dist directory.
